---
name: Convergence alarm
about: Flag a claim, theory, or cycle that may be converging too quickly
title: "Convergence alarm: "
labels: ["convergence-alarm"]
assignees: []
---

## Claim Or Theory

What claim, theory, or cycle appears to be converging too quickly?

## Why This Is A Concern

Check all that apply:

- [ ] No undercutting cards are filed.
- [ ] Credible conflicts were not autopsied.
- [ ] A rubric score is being treated as a verdict.
- [ ] A broad claim lacks scope conditions.
- [ ] A single source cluster is being treated as independent support.
- [ ] No meaningful disagreement has been recorded across repeated reviews.

## Source Artifacts

Link to the relevant cards, theory page, autopsy, rubric, or cycle report.

## Requested Review

What should happen next?

- [ ] Assign designated dissenter.
- [ ] Run or revise a study autopsy.
- [ ] Add undercutting search.
- [ ] Narrow the claim.
- [ ] Re-score the rubric.
- [ ] Other.

## Notes

Keep this issue focused on the reasoning process, not on personal preference for a theory.
